name: More Crafting Tables
description:
Adding the rest of the Crafting Table variants into the game! - - !!THIS IS NOT MY ORIGINAL MOD!!
This is a Port of 'Oh, How the Crafting Has Tabled!' to newer Minecraft Versions, check out theirs for 1.15-1.16.5 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-how-the-crafting-has-tabled

P3NG00 is the Original creator of the mod (I love your mod btw), I have simply just ported it
